text: I sense the boundaries of reality shifting as I move from a sterile, glass-walled conference space into a vibrant, immersive environment dedicated to research and development. Here, colors and light dissolve the ordinary, pulling me into a reflective mood. I feel a mixture of curiosity and anticipation—caught between the roles of observer and participant in a spectacle that is intellectually charged and aesthetically stimulating. The artificial glow heightens my awareness, reminding me that both creation and contemplation can be acts of transformation.
